title: Anniversary gift — English
description: A client looking for a meaningful CHF 5,000 anniversary gift. Demonstrates intent classification (celebration), hybrid retrieval suggesting two complementary pieces, and an offer of a private appointment.
user_messages: I'm looking for an anniversary gift for my wife, around CHF 5,000.

title: Bague de fiançailles — Français
description: Un client cherche une bague de fiançailles dans une fourchette de CHF 12 000. Démontre la détection automatique du français, la classification celebration, et la recommandation de pièces bridal.
user_messages: Bonjour, je cherche une bague de fiançailles autour de CHF 12 000.

title: Alhambra heritage inquiry — English
description: Heritage-led conversation. The orchestrator routes only to heritage RAG (no catalog), composes a reply with a verifiable [HER-XXX] citation, and offers a next step.
user_messages: Tell me about the history of the Alhambra collection.

title: Serti Mystérieux — Français
description: Question patrimoniale en français sur la technique du Serti Mystérieux. Test du locale detection, du retrieval heritage en français, et de la citation [HER-002-MYSTERY-SETTING].
user_messages: Parlez-moi de la technique du Serti Mystérieux.

title: Collector investment piece — English
description: A senior collector looking for an archival Ballerina clip. Triggers investment_piece intent, retrieves high-jewelry pieces, and shows the trace panel revealing BM25's contribution from the word 'archival'.
user_messages: I'm building a collection of archival Ballerina clips and willing to invest meaningfully.

title: Out-of-scope escalation — English
description: Client asks about a third-party brand (Cartier). The rule-based classifier matches the brand pattern and escalates with a graceful human-handoff message. Demonstrates safety / boundary handling.
user_messages: Do you also carry Cartier or Bvlgari pieces?

title: Estimation hors catalogue — Français
description: Une cliente demande la valeur de revente d'une pièce héritée. Hors périmètre du concierge → escalade vers un conseiller humain en français. Démontre le routing safety bilingue.
user_messages: Pouvez-vous me dire la valeur de revente du collier de ma grand-mère ?

title: Private appointment in Geneva — English
description: Client requests a private appointment. Demonstrates appointment intent, advisor assignment in templated reply, and the maison's voice for booking.
user_messages: I'd like to book a private appointment in Geneva next week.
